mission.title: chaos-mesh: Remove privileged and add some capabilities
mission.description:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Fix #1101 

### What is changed and how does it work?

Chaos Daemon now works with `privileged: false`. In replace, it creates a `fuse` device and add it to cgroup device list manually.

resolution.summary:
cherry-pick #1109 to release-1.0
